summary: Fleet Portal Add Vehicle Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 22/22 API tests passed (12 existing + 10 new for vehicle ref endpoints and POST /api/fleet/vehicles). Frontend: All test scenarios passed - Vehicles list with 'Ajouter un vehicule' button, Add Vehicle form with all fields (plate, VIN, color, cascade dropdowns Year→Make→Model, Category, VTC checkbox), form validation, cancel/back navigation. Regression: Add Driver feature and Vehicle detail panel still working.

issues: React hydration warnings in console due to Emergent preview system wrapper elements injecting <span> into <tbody>/<tr>/<select>/<option> - cosmetic only, does NOT affect functionality

backend_tests.existing_fleet_tests: 12/12 PASS - All existing fleet portal tests pass
backend_tests.vehicle_models_by_year_and_make: PASS - GET /api/fleet/vehicles/ref/models/2024/Audi returns models with id, model, type
backend_tests.vehicle_types_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/fleet/vehicles/ref/types returns ['Luxury Sedan', 'Luxury Van', 'Regular Zont', 'Shuttle private 8 pers.']
backend_tests.add_vehicle_missing_fields: PASS - POST /api/fleet/vehicles returns 422 for missing required fields
backend_tests.add_vehicle_validation: PASS - POST /api/fleet/vehicles correctly validates and proxies to C# API

frontend_tests.vehicles_page_load: PASS - data-testid='fleet-vehicles' found, shows vehicles table with data
frontend_tests.add_vehicle_button: PASS - data-testid='add-vehicle-btn' shows 'Ajouter un vehicule' text

add_vehicle_form_fields.make: PASS - data-testid='vehicle-make' select, loads makers after year selection
add_vehicle_form_fields.model: PASS - data-testid='vehicle-model' select, loads models after maker selection
add_vehicle_form_fields.type: PASS - data-testid='vehicle-type' select with ['Luxury Sedan', 'Luxury Van', 'Regular Zont', 'Shuttle private 8 pers.']

cascade_dropdowns.maker_selection: PASS - Selecting Audi loads models (q8 - Regular Zont)
cascade_dropdowns.model_auto_type: PASS - Selecting model auto-fills type field

frontend_tests.form_validation: PASS - Submitting empty form shows toast 'Veuillez remplir tous les champs obligatoires'
frontend_tests.submit_button: PASS - data-testid='submit-add-vehicle-btn' present with 'Ajouter le vehicule' text

regression_tests.add_driver_button: PASS - data-testid='add-driver-btn' still visible with 'Ajouter un chauffeur' text
regression_tests.vehicle_detail_panel: PASS - Clicking 'Voir' on vehicle row opens data-testid='vehicle-detail' panel showing: Annee, Couleur, Categorie, VTC, Statut, Chauffeur

verified_features: Fleet Login: Email/password form works with test credentials
Vehicles List Page: Shows existing vehicles in table format with 'Ajouter un vehicule' button
Add Vehicle Button: Green button with Plus icon navigates to /fleet/vehicles/add
Add Vehicle Form: All required fields present (plate number, VIN, color, year, make, model, category, VTC checkbox)
Cascade Dropdowns: Year → Make → Model pattern works correctly via C# API
Year Dropdown: Loads years from GET /api/fleet/vehicles/ref/years
Make Dropdown: Loads makers from GET /api/fleet/vehicles/ref/makers/{year} after year selection
Model Dropdown: Loads models from GET /api/fleet/vehicles/ref/models/{year}/{make} after maker selection
Category Dropdown: Loads types from GET /api/fleet/vehicles/ref/types
Form Validation: Client-side validation shows error toast when required fields empty
Backend POST /api/fleet/vehicles: Correctly validates payload and proxies to C# API
REGRESSION: Add Driver feature still works
REGRESSION: Vehicle detail panel still works
critical_code_review_comments: FleetAddVehicle.js correctly implements cascade dropdowns Year→Make→Model
Frontend handles both 'make' and 'maker' field names from C# API response
Form validation happens client-side before API call for immediate feedback
Backend POST /api/fleet/vehicles correctly constructs nested vehicleMakeModel payload for C# API
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Vehicle ref endpoints properly proxy to C# API with token authentication

seed_data.vehicles: 1 vehicle: Toyota CH-R (plate: 777, 2020, Black, Regular Zont, Active)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Fleet portal Add Vehicle feature fully tested. All data proxies to C# API at api.zont.cab. Cascade dropdowns work: Year→Make→Model. DO NOT actually submit real vehicle creation as it persists in C# production system. Test only up to validation step. React hydration warnings are from Emergent preview wrapper injecting spans - cosmetic only.

mocked_api.note: All Fleet APIs proxy to real C# backend at https://api.zont.cab - no mocked data
